title: Blepharoglossum grossum
taxonomy: Blepharoglossum grossum belongs to the family Polypodiaceae, commonly known as the polypody ferns. This family of ferns is part of the larger group known as Polypodiales, which includes various species of ferns that have a similar structure. Blepharoglossum grossum is also a member of the order Polypodiales and the class Polypodiopsida. The class Polypodiopsida further categorizes into the division Pteridophyta, which includes all ferns.
